title: Adaptive Street-Lighting Power Law — extrapolating symbolic regression
strategies: constant baseline: predict the mean training power draw (ignores structure) -> ~0.1
linear least squares y~1+x1+x2+x3+x4: captures trend, misses curvature, extrapolates poorly
structured basis [1,x1,x1^2,exp(c*x2),x3*x4] with a grid search over the hidden exp rate c, coefficients by least squares
alternatives: finer / continuous optimisation of c, ridge-regularised bases, or adding cross terms to trade complexity penalty against held-out error
